title: Prevent Undefined in DocuGen
excerpt: Is there a way to prevent DocuGen from listing undefined in a document? For example, if I have values for 3 contacts that we normally have in a document, but only enter 2, can I prevent DocuGen from displaying undefined …

posts.author: bglick (Bradley Glick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to prevent DocuGen from listing undefined in a document? For example, if I have values for 3 contacts that we normally have in a document, but only enter 2, can I prevent DocuGen from displaying undefined and simply leave it blank?

Any help would be greatly appreciated!

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: @samicaracand just for your attention.
